chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 794 of 2010 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For directions For hearing of CMA No.9534/2012 (C/A) 16.01.2024 M/s Ghulam Shabbeer Shar and Deedar Ali M. Chohan, Advocates for petitioners/applicants. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- The listed application No.9534/2012 is pending since 2012 and is not being pursued properly. Even otherwise, we have seen it is not maintainable and is accordingly dismissed. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
